items.name: White/Yellow Hoodie Streetwear (Access Denied)
items.description:
This is hoodie (top) only
For the matching set / bottoms, check the community store

ACCESS DENIED
Upgrade your avatar with a bold cyber streetwear hoodie that stands out in any game.

✔️ Unique and eye-catching graphic design
✔️ “ACCESS DENIED” tape-style details for an edgy look
✔️ High-contrast yellow color that pops in-game
✔️ Perfect for streetwear, cyber, and edgy avatar styles

Designed for players who want to stand out and look different.
